backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the 'Luminia Gadgets' nav button was replaced with a 'Connect With Us' smooth-scroll button, with references to the affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Luminia Group luxury corporate website.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and Footer into a dark obsidian-themed single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand logo, portfolio list, and contact links (email, WhatsApp, Instagram); uses id='contact-section' as the scroll target for the 'Connect With Us' nav button.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section featuring a background image, animated gold shimmer headline, manifesto quote, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the empire grid section.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Interstitial section displaying a large editorial blockquote with gold gradient text and a subtle diagonal geometric background texture.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop links (Home, Our Empire, Connect With Us), a Pre-Launch badge, and a mobile drawer menu; 'Connect With Us' smooth-scrolls to the footer contact section.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: Modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a selected subsidiary, with keyboard (Escape) and click-outside close support, and previous/next navigation between subsidiaries.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of seven Luminia Group subsidiaries and renders them in a responsive grid; clicking a card opens the SubsidiaryDetails modal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static corporate website.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind layers, and defines a dark luxury design system with gold, obsidian, ivory, and charcoal CSS custom properties and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with luxury color tokens (gold, obsidian, ivory), custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Montserrat), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, version, existing features, and feature requests for the Luminia Group site; currently records one completed navigation feature.
